translation: Do you want to come with us?

sentence: Di fuud de pan di tiebl.
translation: The food is on the table.
Give me a mango, will you?

sentence: Di pikni dem nyam aal di rais.
translation: The children ate all the rice.

sentence: Wi a go a toun tumaro.

translation: Have you seen the new shop?

sentence: Tek di bos go a skuul.
Mek wi go a di bich!

translation: Do you know where he lives?

sentence: Wi taak bout it laas nait.
translation: We talked about it last night.

sentence: Im tel mi se yu sik.
translation: He told me that you're sick.

sentence: Di bwai dem a ron pan di ruod.
translation: The boys are running on the road.

sentence: Mi faada wok haad evri die.
translation: My father works hard every day.

sentence: Di pikni dem de a skuul.
Di uman a sel mango a maakit.
translation: The woman is selling mangoes at the market.

sentence: Di man dem a wok pan di ous.
translation: The men are working on the house.

sentence: Di bwai kech wan big fish.
translation: The boy caught a big fish.

sentence: Di gyal dem a sing iina di kwaia.
translation: The girls are singing in the choir.
The water is cold and nice.

sentence: Mi no av no moni pan mi.
translation: I don't have any money on me.

sentence: A wa taim di bos a kom?
translation: What time is the bus coming?

sentence: Evri die mi waak go a wok.
translation: Every day I walk to work.
The night is dark and quiet.

sentence: Di pus de ina di ous.
translation: The cat is in the house.

sentence: Put di pat pan di faiya.
translation: Put the pot on the fire.

sentence: We yu a go so faas?
translation: Where are you going so fast?

sentence: A uu dat a di duo?
translation: Who is that at the door?

sentence: Nof piipl de a di pati.
translation: There are lots of people at the party.

sentence: Di likl gyal kyan riid aredi.
translation: The little girl can read already.

sentence: Di biebi ongri an a krai.
translation: The baby is hungry and crying.

sentence: Di mango dem swiit dis taim a year.
translation: The mangoes are sweet this time of year.

sentence: Mi mada kuk di bes rais an piiz.
translation: My mother cooks the best rice and peas.

sentence: Mi fren dem a kom ova.
Smadi a nak a di duo.
translation: Somebody is knocking at the door.

sentence: Di dag a baak pan di strienja.
translation: The dog is barking at the stranger.

sentence: Di pus a slip anda di tri.
translation: The cat is sleeping under the tree.
